en: Did anybody speak with Salma's people yet? Yes, but she'd rather do a summer cover because
she has a movie coming out. No. Also, I'm pulling the tube in peace on
the Supreme Court women. Woman. And I need to see a new draft on that piece about shopping
ko: 그리고 나는 대법원 여성에 대한 기사와 영상을 준비하고 있어.

en: for a plastic surgeon. It's dull. And this layout for the winter wonderland spread. Not
wonderful yet. Okay. I'll look at it.
What about Testino? Where are we on that? Zac Posen's doing some very sculptural suits,
ko: 테스티노는 어때? 그건 어떻게 되고 있어?

en: so I suggested that Testino shoot them at the Noguchi Garden.
ko: 잭 포젠이 조각 같은 수트를 만들고 있어서, 테스티노에게 노구치 정원에서 촬영하자고 제안했어.

en: Perfect. Thank God somebody came to work today. What about accessories for April?
ko: 오늘 누군가 일하러 와서 정말 다행이야.

en: One thought I had was enamel. Bangles, pendants, earrings.
No, we did that two years ago. What else? Well, they're showing a lot of florals right
ko: 아니, 우리는 2년 전에 그걸 했어. 다른 건 뭐가 있어?

en: now, so I was thinking I could do a shoot. Florals? For spring. Groundbreaking.
We thought about shooting them in an industrial space. We thought the contrast between the
ko: 하지만 우리는 산업 공간에서 촬영하는 것도 생각했어.

en: femininity of the florals and the more raw, rough-hewn background would create this wonderful
ko: 꽃무늬의 여성스러움과 더 거칠고 원초적인 배경의 대비를 생각했어...
